activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception active - letter of credit verification not applied
Consignor identification via presence in invoice text (consolidated corporate group allowed)
Consignor name match with legal company form abbreviation normalization
Consignor country exact match with normalization
Consignee prioritization: invoice to / bill to etc.
Consignee country exact match with normalization
General goods description with explicit invoice reference in certificate
Quantity manual review due to lack of explicit quantity in invoice but presence in certificate and goods description

consignor.certificate_value:

Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20
SE-412 56, Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
WisePartners AB
Viktor Rydbergsgatan 20
SE-412 56 Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'WisePartners AB' with address in Gothenburg, Sweden is clearly identified in the invoice including exact company name, address, and country. The abbreviation 'AB' is accepted as legal form normalization. Country Sweden matches exactly after normalization. No contradictory data found. Rule 4.1.0 allows consignor recognition anywhere in invoice text, fulfilled here.

consignee.certificate_value:

UMM AL THOUB, UMM AL QUWAIN

consignee.invoice_value:
Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC
PO Box 1985
Warehouse C-7, New Industrial Area
Umm Al Thoub, Umm Al Quwain
United Arab Emirates
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC' name and address match exactly in invoice 'Al Bayan Packaging Industry LLC' with matching address lines and country 'United Arab Emirates'. The legal form suffix 'LLC' matches with normalization. Consignee appears as invoice recipient part consistent with priority rules. Country match confirmed after normalization.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Kraftliner
as per commercial invoice 20104403 dd 10.02.2026
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Kraftliner' from certificate is explicitly linked to invoice number 20104403 dated 10.02.2026 in certificate text. Invoice contains 'Kraftliner' as product description matching certificate without contradiction. The general goods description with explicit invoice reference is sufficient for verification.

quantity.motivation: Quantity '175940 kg net' in certificate is matched to invoice net weight 175,940 mt (metric tons), which is equivalent to 175,940 kilograms. Decimal comma in invoice normalized as per culture convention. Quantity unit normalized as kg with conversion factor 1 MT = 1000 KG allowed. Certificate explicitly indicates net weight. No contradictory quantity found.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'Australia' explicitly stated in certificate and confirmed by invoice text 'goods are of Australia origin'. No evidence of contradictory or missing origin data in invoice. Exact string match after normalization established.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match exactly or with accepted normalization. No contradictions or ambiguities identified.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikat och faktura. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan vidare manuell granskning.
